name: Foreign Exchange Reserves
description: India's total foreign exchange reserves held by the RBI — foreign currency assets, gold, SDRs and the IMF reserve position. Reserves are the country's buffer against external shocks and a key input into how much room the RBI has to defend the rupee.
source: Reserve Bank of India, Weekly Statistical Supplement
releaseSchedule: Released weekly, every Friday, with a one-week lag.

chart.title: Reserves have rebuilt through the year
chart.subtitle: Foreign exchange reserves, $ billion, month-end
chart.source: RBI Weekly Statistical Supplement; illustrative series
